articles.author: Becky Sullivan
articles.title: The U.S. may face Australia in the World Cup without star Christian Pulisic - NPR
articles.description: The left winger Pulisic was key to the Americans' fluid and effective attack in last week's win over Paraguay. But he was kicked in the calf, left at halftime, and hasn't trained with the team since.
articles.content:
SEATTLE The performance of the U.S. men's national soccer team in Friday's match against Australia could come down to the health of star Christian Pulisic and specifically, his left calf.
The group … [+2403 chars]

articles.author: Sneha S K, Reuters
articles.title: RFK Jr. orders American exposed to hantavirus to stay quarantined against her will - USA Today
articles.description: The health secretary's order to keep the exposed American in hantavirus quarantine also goes against medical advice.
articles.content: U.S. Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has ordered an American passenger exposed to hantavirus on a cruise ship to remain in quarantine despite medical advice and against her will, according to … [+2796 chars]
